product_overview: Single Page Application to view and manage a Balanced Scorecard (BSC): authenticated users can inspect perspectives, projects and activities, update activity progress, and consult the hierarchical weightings table.
core_goals: Authenticate and access the BSC dashboard
See an executive overview of strategic perspectives with weighted progress
Browse projects organized by perspective and inspect project progress
Browse activities/actions across projects and check their progress status
Update an activity's progress value and propagate changes across views
Inspect the hierarchical weightings table (perspectives → projects → activities)
Switch the UI between light and dark themes

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow a user to sign in with username and password to start a session and access protected BSC views.
user_flows: Navigate to /signin -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Ingresar" button to submit -> See dashboard (/) after successful authentication
Navigate to /signin -> Fill username input field with invalid credentials -> Fill password input field -> Click "Ingresar" button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /signin -> Fill password input field -> Toggle password visibility with eye icon -> See password displayed visibly

features.name: Strategic Lines Dashboard
features.description: Show all perspectives with their objectives, weights and a weighted progress overview plus top-level KPIs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See list of perspectives with progress bars -> See weighted progress percentages per perspective -> See KPIs summary (Progreso General, N.° Perspectivas, N.° Proyectos, Completadas)

features.name: Projects View
features.description: Browse all projects grouped under their parent perspectives and inspect project-level progress and details.
user_flows: Navigate to /proyectos -> View projects grouped by perspective -> Expand/collapse perspective sections to explore contained projects -> See project details and progress

features.name: Actions View
features.description: List all activities/actions across perspectives grouped by project so users can inspect activity progress and responsible parties.
user_flows: Navigate to /acciones -> View actions/activities across all perspectives -> Expand/collapse project sections to reveal activities -> See progress status per activity -> Expand a project section and observe smooth scroll to the expanded section

features.name: Data Entry - Update Activity Progress
features.description: Let users select a perspective, then a project and an activity via cascading selects, adjust a 0–100% slider and submit an updated progress value.
user_flows: Navigate to /ingreso-datos -> Select a perspective from dropdown -> Select a project from dropdown (enabled after perspective selection) -> Select an activity from dropdown (enabled after project selection) -> Adjust progress slider (0-100%) -> Click "Actualizar Avance" button to save -> See success notification after update
Navigate to /ingreso-datos -> Select a perspective from dropdown -> Click "Actualizar Avance" button without selecting project or activity -> See validation error indicating required selection

features.name: Weightings Table
features.description: Display a hierarchical table of perspectives, projects and activities showing weight badges, progress semaphores and responsible information.
user_flows: Navigate to /ponderaciones -> See hierarchical perspectives, projects and activities table -> Expand a perspective section -> Expand a project section within that perspective -> View weight badges and progress for each activity

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Allow the user to switch the app theme between light and dark modes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle button in header -> Page switches to dark mode -> Click theme toggle button in header -> Page switches to light mode

routes.description: Main dashboard showing strategic lines with progress overview
Data entry form to update activity progress via cascading selects
Weightings table showing hierarchical perspective/project/activity data

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with username and password to obtain JWT tokens
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Toggle password visibility with eye icon

features.name: Strategic Lines Dashboard
features.description: View all perspectives with weighted progress overview after login
user_interactions: View list of perspectives with progress bars
See weighted progress percentages per perspective

features.name: Data Entry - Update Activity Progress
features.description: Select perspective, project, activity via cascading dropdowns and update progress with a slider
user_interactions: Select a project from dropdown (enabled after perspective selection)
Select an activity from dropdown (enabled after project selection)

features.name: Weightings Table
features.description: Hierarchical view of perspectives, projects, and activities with weightings and progress
user_interactions: View weight badges and progress for each activity

features.name: Projects View
features.description: View all projects organized by perspective

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Toggle between light and dark theme
user_interactions: Click theme toggle button in header
Page switches between light and dark mode

known_limitations.issue: No logout button visible in the UI header/sidebar
known_limitations.impact: Users must clear localStorage manually or navigate to /signin to re-login

known_limitations.issue: No error boundary component wrapping routes
known_limitations.impact: Unhandled runtime errors crash the entire app instead of showing a fallback

known_limitations.issue: TanStack Query staleTime is 5 minutes, no manual refetch triggers
known_limitations.impact: Data may appear stale after mutations if cache is not invalidated
